title: Greenpill 2025: A Year in Review
dek: The approved Paragraph preview gives the site a source-backed 2025 story for gatherings, the podcast archive, ecosystem work, hard truths, and 2026 seeds.
excerpt: A network-level 2025 review covering IRL service, Ethereum Localism, the Greenpill podcast, Regen Coordination, and the lessons shaping 2026.
body:
The approved 2025 Paragraph preview should be treated as a network-level story source.

It captures the mix of local service, in-person gathering, podcast publishing, ecosystem building, and honest operating lessons that shaped the year. The story includes Greenpill Goonies Giveback service activity around ETHDenver, GFEL Boulder and Ethereum Localism, 280+ podcast episodes across multiple seasons and mini-series, Regen Coordination and CIDS adoption work, Regen Commons, Gardens-based conviction voting, Localism Fund discussions, and candid notes on dormancy, coordination overhead, grant dependency, and volunteer burnout.

This should not become a large set of thin operational records. The right public use is one Year in Review story plus links into stronger chapter, guild, and resource surfaces.

## Sources

- S070: https://paragraph.com/@greenpill/preview/8QcFgBeASBiEy4QVxmZj
author: Greenpill Network research
